description: Compare 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\PolicyReview\DRP_Original.docx' (Original) and 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\PolicyReview\DRP_Revised.docx' (Revised) to identify and resolve changes for a disaster recovery policy. Accept the following changes: the title change to 'Business Continuity...', the RTO change to '24 hours', the 'Division managers' update, the 'automated notification system' update, and the new 'cloud-based backup' paragraph. Reject the deletion of the 'Annual testing' sentence in Section 6 and the change to 'reviewed semi-annually' in Section 7 (maintaining 'annually'). Ensure no tracked changes remain in the final version and save the document to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\DisasterRecoveryPolicy_Final.docx'.

expected_text_includes: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plan
Annual testing of the disaster recovery procedures shall be conducted
